DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CRISTINA SALANOVA'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER, TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DATES FOR DEPOSITIONS AND FOR SANCTIONS. THE PARTIES COMMUNICATED TO THE COURT SUBSEQUENT TO PLAINTIFF'S FILING OF THE MOTION TO COMPEL THAT ALL OF THE SUBSTANTIVE ISSUES PERTAINING TO THE SETTING OF MULTIPLE DEPOSITIONS HAVE BEEN RESOLVED, AND THE MOTION FOR ANY SUBSTANTIVE RELIEF HAS BEEN WITHDRAWN. REMAINING OPEN IS PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR IMPOSITION OF MONETARY SANCTIONS AS AGAINST DEFENDANT, TROPO, INC., WHICH IS DENIED. THE COURT AGREES WITH DEFENDANT TROPO'S COUNSEL THE "MEET AND CONFER" PROCESS WAS NOT SUFFICIENTLY EXHAUSTED AS TO THAT PARTY SO AS TO SUPPORT A SANCTION AWARD. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED.=(302/JPT)

Off Calendar Nov-20-2014 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-11-2014 Continued To Jan-12-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Subpoena Of Margaret A. Keane; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-27-2014 Text Ruling

Ntc Of Mtn For Protective Order, To Compel Production Of Dates For Depositions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-16-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher Foster, Esq., of DLA Piper (415-836-2534) for Tropo INc., Defendant and opposing party.
No other appearance on the matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CRISTINA SALANOVA's Motion For Protective Order, To Compel Production Of Dates For Depositions And For Sanctions. The parties communicated to the Court subsequent to plaintiff's filing of the motion to compel that all of the substantive issues pertaining to the setting of multiple depositions have been resolved, and the motion for any substantive relief has been withdrawn. Remaining open is plaintiff's request for imposition of monetary sanctions as against defendant, Tropo, Inc., which is denied. The Court agrees with defendant Tropo's counsel the "meet and confer" process was not sufficiently exhausted as to that party so as to support a sanction award. Order is signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported.
=(302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pltff Cristina Moe Salanova'S Deposition; Request For Sanctions
